category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a many-to-one page printing utility; official README/homepage is for mpage.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is mpage and official README URL is under /pub/mpage/.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is an official README page and is the best available official documentation surface.
repo_sources: No official source-control URL was present in source_facts.repo or found on the official Mesa mpage README/homepage; source archive is not a repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe many-to-one printing/page reduction for PostScript-compatible output.
